title: Token Transfer
description: An ERC-20 or ERC-777 fungible token transfer event including mints, sends, and burns.

transaction_hash.description: Hash of the transaction containing this transfer.

log_index.description: Index of the event log within the transaction.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this transfer occurred.

from_address.description: Sender address. Zero address indicates a mint.

to_address.description: Recipient address. Zero address indicates a burn.

quantity.description: Amount transferred in the token's smallest unit (as string to avoid precision loss).
